title: inula stewartii
intro: Inula stewartii, also known as Stewart's inula, is a perennial plant species within the aster family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. Inula stewartii has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Inula stewartii are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary.
